modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat games, school platforms, algorithmic recommendation, friendship chat, family device boundaries, and identity formation as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern public ranking or clip culture becomes the battle pressure, but victory still comes from trained body, rival, mentor, and cost.

catalyst.logline: A clipped school or arcade match falsely crowns the protagonist as a fraud, and the rival forces a real-world rematch where the body cannot edit the replay.
catalyst.genre_transmutation: Online status becomes public duel pressure.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=en_US; audience=gen_alpha. Use catalyst 'ranked_clip_challenge': A clipped school or arcade match falsely crowns the protagonist as a fraud, and the rival forces a real-world rematch where the body cannot edit the replay. Transmutation: Online status becomes public duel pressure. Market surface: Use social discovery, school/work pressure, gaming, creator culture, comic shop/community, and phone-native life without sounding like an ad for platforms. Audience rule: Treat games, school platforms, algorithmic recommendation, friendship chat, family device boundaries, and identity formation as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.
